summary: Release-candidate preparation and readiness review only; no product/runtime behavior implemented or changed. Reviewed pyproject.toml version (0.1.0): already correct base for a v0.1.0-rc1 pre-release tag, no version bump performed. Decision: Ready to tag v0.1.0-rc1 after operator approval. No tag created -- deferred to Phase 106F. 29 new tests. Non-executing.
note: Pre-push draft. Report will be corrected and re-dispatched after pcae push resolves final push state, per the established 105C.1/105D pattern. During this phase's own task-finish run, .pcae/phase-completion-metadata.json still held 106D's stale content at the moment `pcae task finish --commit` ran, causing an incorrectly-attributed notification (phase_id 106D content sent under the new 106E finish commit hash) -- this file now corrects that content; a final, correctly-attributed dispatch will follow after push, matching the self-healing idempotency-key design (phase_id+commit pair in .last-notified.json).
